# Eluro

> Eluro — thoughtfully chosen premium leather goods and accessories, crafted to endure.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured collections and brand story.
- [Shop](/shop): Browse all Eluro leather goods and accessories.
- [About](/about): Our craft, materials, and philosophy.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Eluro team.
- [Shipping](/shipping): Delivery times and shipping policy.
- [Refund Policy](/refund): Returns and refund terms.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
